apps.name: Ask on Page
apps.description: Highlight text, press Ctrl+J, get AI-powered explanations with web search

manifest.name: Ask on Page
manifest.description: Highlight text, press Ctrl+J, get AI-powered explanations with web search

apps.name: Cinematic View for X
apps.description: Adds a Cinematic View toggle to X (Twitter). Blacks out the left and right side panels and hides the For you / Following / composer header, leaving only the centered timeline of posts. Smoothly animated.

manifest.name: Cinematic View for X
manifest.description: Adds a Cinematic View toggle to X (Twitter). Blacks out the left and right side panels and hides the For you / Following / composer header, leaving only the centered timeline of posts. Smoothly animated.

apps.name: Customizable X
apps.description: Reorder X (Twitter) like iPhone apps. Enter Arrange mode and drag the left menu items (Home, Explore, …) and the right sidebar sections (Search, Subscribe, What's happening, Who to follow) into the order you want — it sticks across reloads.

manifest.name: Customizable X
manifest.description: Reorder X (Twitter) like iPhone apps. Enter Arrange mode and drag the left menu items (Home, Explore, …) and the right sidebar sections (Search, Subscribe, What's happening, Who to follow) into the order you want — it sticks across reloads.

apps.name: Focus Mode
apps.description: Hides distracting content, enforces time-based access, blocks distracting sites including HLTV and Hacker News, and messaging focus mode

apps.name: Gmail Calendar Shortcut
apps.description: Reads email conversations and uses AI to pre-fill Google Calendar events

apps.description: AI-powered research for LinkedIn profiles using web search

apps.name: Socials Finder
apps.description: Find a person's GitHub and X accounts from their LinkedIn profile and show them below the affiliation block

apps.name: YouTube Clip Cutter
apps.description: Adds a Cut button under YouTube videos. Pick a start/end range on the timeline and download just that fragment as an MP4 (saved to your Downloads). Requires yt-dlp + ffmpeg.
